reviews.comment:
Demoran mucho en atender, las islas de servicio están generalmente cerradas quedando disponibles sólo 1 o 2 con importantes colas. Y la Atención, cada vez de peor calidad.

(Translated by Google)
They take forever to serve you, the service islands are usually closed, leaving only one or two open with long queues. And the service is getting worse and worse.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBeUtuenJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para cargar combustible, y/o comprar algo para comer. En primer piso cuenta con servicio para realizar service o lavado de auto. Acepta todos los medios de pago, sistema de serviclub siempre me anduvo. Aire gratis.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to fill up on gas and/or grab a bite to eat. On the first floor, there's a car service or wash. All payment methods are accepted; the Serviclub system always worked for me. Free air conditioning.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3d2VfVmVREAE
